_draft: Staged registration for the closure-gate hook (lives in E:/hooks/depcruiser-migrations/). NOT live until Jon merges hookEntry into E:/hooks/config.json hooks[] (then regenerate config.schema.json from _core/config-model.mjs and run _core/validate-runtime-hooks.mjs), and adds verifyManifestDomain to the relevant repo in quality-completion-gate/quality-verify-manifest.json. Agents draft; Jon locks. NOTE: hook id stays 'closure-gate' (= filename closure-gate.mjs); only the containing dir was renamed to depcruiser-migrations.

hookEntry.name: Closure Pre-Edit Gate
hookEntry.description: PreToolUse gate. For the armed migration, blocks edits to the target page until its import closure has been traced and every node in the closure manifest has a verdict (port/adapter/cut). Completion-side checks (depcruise rule violations, tsc --noEmit, donor/target reconcile) are delegated to quality-completion-gate via verify-manifest domain entries — not a second Stop hook. JSON decision, exits 0, fail-open.

active._note: Arm a migration by setting name (+ optional targetGlob to scope which edits are guarded). Null name = gate is dormant.

verifyManifestDomain._note: Add this 'closure' domain to the target repo entry in quality-verify-manifest.json. Replace <target-entry> and the path rules. depcruise default reporter exits non-zero on error-severity rules; tsc --noEmit and reconcile exit non-zero on failure — all exit-code authority, matching the gate.
